name: OKCarz Tampa
description_short: OK Carz Tampa is a Buy Here Pay Anywhere used car dealership offering in-house auto financing to buyers with poor or no credit history, with approval focus on income and stability rather than credit scores.
description_long:
OK Carz Tampa, operating as OK Carz North Florida Avenue, is a used car dealership located at 9399 N Florida Ave in Tampa, Florida. The dealership has evolved from a traditional Buy Here Pay Here model to position itself as a "Buy Here Pay Anywhere" operation, indicating customers can make payments through multiple channels rather than only at the dealership location. The company operates under the Mid Florida Financing brand for its in-house finance division, handling both vehicle sales and lending simultaneously.

OK Carz offers financing for used vehicle purchases to consumers across all credit profiles, including those with past credit problems, repossessions, or bankruptcy. Their inventory includes sedans, pickup trucks, minivans, and SUVs. The financing structure requires proof of income, a valid US driver's license, and proof of Florida residency for qualification. Down payments start at $499 for qualified buyers, and the company reports all payments to the three major credit bureaus. The OK Carz Finance Solution provides multiple payment methods including an online portal, Walmart locations, Amscot locations, mail, and phone payments.

What distinguishes OK Carz is their stated emphasis on approval speed and accessibility. They claim "extremely high approval rates" and aim to have customers "fully approved and on the road the same day" upon receiving documentation. Their financing decisions focus on income stability rather than credit history alone. After 24 months of on-time payments, customers may qualify to trade in their vehicle for a newer one. All vehicles undergo reconditioning and a two-stage inspection process including a comprehensive road test before sale.

The main caveat is that this is fundamentally a vehicle financing company, not an emergency cash lender or traditional personal lender. While they provide credit-building opportunities through timely payment reporting, their core service is secured auto lending. The "emergency-cash" categorization appears incorrect—this is a personal loan provider (auto-specific) with longer repayment terms typical of vehicle financing. There is no information about APRs, finance charges, or total cost of ownership provided on the website, which is critical information for consumers.
pros: Same-day approval and vehicle delivery stated as goal upon documentation receipt
Extremely high approval rates with focus on income stability rather than credit score
Minimal down payments starting at $499 for qualified buyers
Multiple convenient payment channels (online, Walmart, Amscot, mail, phone)
Credit bureau reporting on all payments to help rebuild credit history
All vehicles undergo two-stage inspection and comprehensive road test
Trade-in opportunity after 24 months of on-time payments
In-house financing eliminates need to shop for separate lender
cons: No APR, interest rate, or total finance charge information disclosed on website
Service and parts departments show no available hours—no maintenance support offered
Limited to vehicle purchases only; cannot provide general emergency cash or personal loans
Requires Florida residency proof, limiting to Florida residents only
No information about maximum loan amounts, payment terms, or loan duration options
best_for: Florida residents with poor or no credit history seeking reliable used vehicles
Consumers with past bankruptcy, repossession, or credit problems needing affordable transportation
Buyers unable to qualify for traditional auto financing who need same-day vehicle delivery
diagnosis: OK Carz Tampa is best suited for Florida residents with damaged or no credit history who need reliable used transportation and can qualify based on income stability. The primary caveat is that this is a secured auto loan product, not an unsecured personal loan or emergency cash service, and critical pricing information (APR, finance charges, payment terms) is absent from their website—consumers must contact directly for full cost disclosure.
services: Buy Here Pay Anywhere used vehicle financing
In-house auto loans through Mid Florida Financing
Trade-in program after 24 months on-time payments
